title: Document Medication Administration (BCMA)
description: A nurse is administering a scheduled medication to an inpatient and must document it using Barcode Medication Administration (BCMA).

tasks.description: Scan the barcode on the patient's wristband.
tasks.expected_outcome: The system correctly identifies the patient and opens their Medication Administration Record (MAR).

tasks.description: Scan the barcode on the medication packaging.
tasks.expected_outcome: The system verifies that the scanned medication matches an active order for that patient.

tasks.description: Administer the medication and sign the MAR to document that the dose was given.
tasks.expected_outcome: Nurse successfully documents the administration, and the MAR is updated with the time and date.
